overview: Sue Letter is an AI-powered demand letter generator that produces lawyer-quality legal demand letters in minutes. Users choose from 8 dispute types, fill a guided multi-step form, and receive a fully populated letter with real statute citations, live preview, and download options.
features: AI demand letter generation for 8 dispute types
Multi-step guided form with live letter preview
Real statute citations tailored to jurisdiction and country
PDF and DOCX download with inline editing before export
Letter Strength Analyzer with score and improvement tips
Follow-up letter generator and AI Q&A assistant
Gmail integration for direct letter sending
Stripe subscription tiers with usage gating
Image evidence upload with thumbnail previews
